title: Claude Code Command Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for Claude Code command skill file frontmatter

description.description: Human-readable description of what the command does

argument-hint.description: Hint shown to the user for the command argument

model.description: Preferred model to use when running this command

allowed-tools.description: List of tools the command is permitted to use (array or space-delimited string)

quality_level.description: Quality enforcement level for this file (0-3)

context.description: Execution context for the command (e.g. fork)

agent.description: Agent mode or name to use when running this command

effort.description: Reasoning effort level for the command
